diagrams.title: Blue-Green Deployment Architecture
diagrams.description: Shows two identical environments (blue and green) with load balancer routing traffic between them
diagrams.purpose: Visualize how blue-green deployment enables instant switchover and rollback with zero downtime

diagrams.title: Canary Deployment Flow
diagrams.description: Illustrates gradual traffic shift from old to new version with monitoring at each stage
diagrams.purpose: Understand how canary releases minimize risk by testing with small user subset first

diagrams.title: CI/CD Pipeline Stages
diagrams.description: Shows automated pipeline from code commit through build, test, and deployment stages
diagrams.purpose: Visualize end-to-end automation of deployment process with quality gates

diagrams.title: Rolling Deployment Process
diagrams.description: Demonstrates sequential instance update maintaining service availability
diagrams.purpose: Understand how rolling updates maintain availability during incremental changes
